rationale: Bake-off 2026-05-13 (kstrat2001/darkmux#45 closure). D (qwen3.6-35b-a3b-turboquant-mlx) won 4/4 paired rounds for routine coding. A (qwen3.5-122b-a10b) reserved as heavy-reasoning defensive. B (qwen3-coder-next-mlx) reserved for single-shot prose quality. The 35B-A3B sweet spot pairs ~3GB active VRAM with the 4B compactor's working memory, giving headroom for long-agentic dispatches on 128GB systems.
